case_title: ALMANARA INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. CARLOS CALARA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CALARA, CARLOS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALARA, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5519 MISSION STREET, APARTMENT 107, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALMANARA INVESTMENTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALARA, CARLOS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $38.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALMANARA INVESTMENTS, INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CALARA, CARLOS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALMANARA INVESTMENTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CALARA, CARLOS 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CALARA, CARLOS
